habits: I love to swim, play in the sand, and eat ice cream.
I love to read a good mystery novel.
I love to take them to the park and play soccer with them.
I like to read all kinds of books, but I especially enjoy historical fiction and fantasy novels.
I like to make models of characters from video games and movies.
personal_facts: I have a nickname that my friends call me.
I have a red headed brother and he has had two of them.
I have a parrot named Todd.
